inputs.prompt: Podcast: 'Deep Cuts' — a true crime podcast, episodes average 55 minutes, host-narrated with interview clips, explicit language occasionally, no fixed schedule, episodes drop when ready. Current audience: 85,000 downloads per episode. Target radio slot: Weekly 30-minute slot on a national commercial radio station, post-watershed (10pm).
Podcast: interview show about books, 40 minutes average, conversational. Target: Community radio station, 1-hour slot.

Podcast: 'Grenzgänger' — a German-language investigative podcast about cross-border crime in the EU Schengen area. Episodes: 45-60 min, narrative style with interview clips and archive audio. Current audience: 120,000 downloads per episode. Target: WDR 5 (major German public radio), proposed slot: weekly 30-minute commissioned programme. Regulatory context: German broadcasting standards (Landesmedienanstalten), Ofcom-equivalent requirements for balance and accuracy.
